scripts.dev: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; export AUTH_SECRET="${AUTH_SECRET:-$NEXTAUTH_SECRET}"; ./node_modules/.bin/next dev --port 3000
scripts.build: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; export AUTH_SECRET="${AUTH_SECRET:-$NEXTAUTH_SECRET}"; ./node_modules/.bin/next build
scripts.start: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; export AUTH_SECRET="${AUTH_SECRET:-$NEXTAUTH_SECRET}"; ./node_modules/.bin/next start
